steps: "Contact RBC Investor Services to request return of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment on BMO dividend for account 1401234567",
"Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty entitles Norwegian residents to 15% WHT rate, not the 13.5% rate applied",
"Reference CRA Part XIII tax rates confirming 15% is the correct treaty rate for CA-NO dividend withholding",
"If RBC disputes, escalate with formal reclaim citing treaty provisions and Canadian tax authority guidance"

references.title: CRA – Rates for Part XIII Tax (WHT rates & treaty reduction)
